module_info.docstring: Auto-memory scanner — reads and parses project memory files into structured entries.

classes.name: MemoryEntry
classes.docstring: A single fact/entry parsed from auto-memory.

classes.name: ScanResult
classes.docstring: Result of scanning a memory directory.

functions.name: scan_memory_dir
functions.docstring:
Scan all .md files in memory_dir, parse into structured entries.

Parsing rules:
- ## headings define sections
- Bullet points (- or *) at indent level 0 start new entries
- Continuation lines (indented, code blocks) belong to the current entry
- Lines before any ## heading use filename as section name

functions.name: _parse_file
functions.docstring: Parse a single markdown file into entries.

functions.name: _make_entry
functions.docstring: Create a MemoryEntry from accumulated lines.
